default.title: Free Shipping
default.description: It's not actually free we just price it into the products. Someone's paying for it, and it's not us.

default.title: 24/7 Customer Support
default.description: Our AI chat widget is powered by a naive series of if/else statements. Guaranteed to irritate.

default.title: Fast Shopping Cart
default.description: Look how fast that cart is going. What does this mean for the actual experience? I don't know.

default.title: Gift Cards
default.description: Buy them for your friends, especially if they don't like our store. Free money for us, it's great.
